name: monetizationModel
_note: game-design.monetizationModel is one of the four PAGE analysis actions driven via useRunArtifact('game-design') → /api/lens/:domain/:id/run; UNLIKE the workbench macros it reads its input from artifact.DATA (not the 3rd params arg), so the harness sets virtualArtifact.data = input. DETERMINISTIC pure compute: picks a revenue model from a fixed table (premium forces conversion 1.0), projects monthly/annual revenue (annual === monthly*12 by construction), and surfaces ethical guardrails for free-to-play. parseInt/parseFloat coerce expectedDAU/conversionRate so a poisoned value degrades to the default and projectedMonthlyRevenue stays finite (Math.round of a finite product). No empty-input branch — defaults to premium, always ok:true. No DB / LLM / network. Not driven by the assassin (LENS_ACTIONS, no derived base); pinned by server/tests/game-design-lens-macros.test.js (revenue projection + premium conversion + f2p ethics + empty-input default).
